title: The Road to Sabaody: Key Exchange
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Brook, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Whitebeard, Brook, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: But that was over 30 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We have to be on our toes.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: What a surprise! Pools are the greatest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Not yet....!!! I'm still too soft....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: How is it, Robin, Brook, Luffy!?

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Hey hey, something shined just now!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: MMH? Everything seems to be creaking.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Isn't it big? Its mouth, that is.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: I never want to ride it...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Nami-SA----N!D YOUR THRILLER BARK IS READY.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: How do we get to "Fishman Island"?

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Whitebeard, Brook, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.
